final_prompt.prompt:
Create a movie poster for 大话西游.

Style/medium: needs a "90年代港片" aesthetic — references in the spirit of 1990s Hong Kong cinema poster tradition (王家卫 Wong Kar-wai film stills, 徐克 Tsui Hark wuxia visual language, 1990s 香港电影金像奖 campaign art); exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include foreground couple embrace, secondary figures positioned in background distance
Subject: must include 至尊宝 and 紫霞 in an embrace on the city wall as focal subjects, 牛魔王 and 唐僧 standing in the distance
Scene/backdrop: must include the iconic city wall setting from 大话西游
Lighting/mood: 
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: must include film grain texture
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: 
Avoid:
